plugins.name: opencode
plugins.description: Delegate AI coding tasks to OpenCode via its serve API.

plugins.name: google-workspace
plugins.description: Interact with Google Workspace services (Docs, Drive, Sheets, etc.) via the gws CLI.

plugins.name: task-iteration
plugins.description: Orchestrate end-to-end feature implementation from an exec-plan document. Delegates coding to OpenCode, runs independent evaluation, loops fixes until clean, and gates completion on an advisory review.
